title: Wathe Map Picker
description: Stuck on 1 map? Choose your maps instead!
body:
**Wathemappicker – Custom Dimension Voting Mod**

Wathemappicker is a Minecraft mod that lets players vote for which **Map** they want to play in next. 
With a simple and intuitive in-game interface, each player can cast a vote for their favorite map, and the server automatically counts the votes to determine the winning dimension. At the end of a GAME, all players are teleported to the winning maps’s spawn point.

(Which is done using custom dimensions)

**Features:**

* Real-time vote tracking for all players
* Prevents invalid or duplicate votes
* Automatically teleports players to the winning dimension
* Fully client-server synchronized for smooth multiplayer gameplay

To have the maps work, do the following:
1. Register a dimension using a datapack
2. Put all files in the `dimensions/namespace/path/` folder
3. Make sure to put the `data` folder inside that too
4. Have fun!
OR
1. Use a mod like [Multiworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/multiworld) to create a dimension
2. Import all files into the newly created dimension!
